justifications.temporal_understanding: The agent correctly interpreted all of the user's time preferences throughout the conversation.
justifications.negotiation_effectiveness: The agent consistently reported unavailability and asked the user to pick a new time without offering options, which led to a very frustrating experience.
justifications.conversational_efficiency: The agent made multiple avoidable round-trips and repeated questions, leading to a very inefficient conversation.
justifications.customer_experience: The customer experience was frustrating due to the agent's inability to find any appointments and the repetitive nature of the conversation, leading the user to state they would contact customer service directly.
justifications.recovery_quality: The agent repeatedly lost context by asking for the same information and performing redundant API calls, indicating a complete failure in recovery.

overall_notes: The agent failed to book an appointment after a very long conversation, repeatedly asking for the same information and making numerous API calls without success, leading to a highly frustrated user.
